description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof and a spacious, open floor plan. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color with dark trim around the windows, doors, and roof edges. The front features a double garage with blue-gray doors and a main entryway set back between two prominent wings. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof structure is partially exposed, revealing wooden beams and trusses, and the interior layout includes multiple rooms and hallways. The house sits on a flat foundation and is designed for residential use in a neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gable roof, double garage, and symmetrical window arrangement. Light beige walls with dark trim and a partially exposed roof structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway, and symmetrical window placement with visible interior layout.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back rooms, smaller windows, and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, additional windows, and the depth of the house structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with large windows and a clear view of the interior room divisions.
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entryway with a single main door, flanked by windows and sheltered by the roof overhang.
